data.content:
Implementation review requested changes.

Violations:
1. Selected-model state can diverge from actual registration state. In src/components/settings-agents-section.tsx:62-77, the row is marked selected before handleAddScannedOption/addAgent succeeds, and there is no rollback on failure. With the per-row Add button and registered badge removed, that false-positive selection is now the only visible import state.
2. Required behavior is not covered by tests. src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts:1-45 covers only filterSearchableOption and does not exercise the new multi-select combobox, pill rendering, removed scanned-row actions, CLI path display, or button styling/import behavior.

Sanity gates on an isolated branch archive passed: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (1 pre-existing warning only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test.
